name: Playwright Tests

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v5
      with:
        python-version: "3.11"

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Install Playwright browsers 🔥
      run: playwright install  # Installs ALL browsers (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)

    - name: Run tests in parallel
      run: python -m pytest tests/ -v --headless
      env:
        AMZN_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.AMZN_EMAIL }}
        AMZN_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.AMZN_PASSWORD }}
